sourceRefs: DRAFT — c1.2 theme unit. Covers the European-project lexicon (État membre, adhésion, traité, directive/transposer, siéger, souveraineté, supranational, euroscepticisme, compromis, multilinguisme) and decoding legislative formulations (devoir vs s'efforcer, le cas échéant), with an ironic multilingualism column as the reading. Awaiting native-speaker review.

Progression blueprint: Alter Ego 5 C1>C2 (Hachette), Dossier 6 'Eurovisions' (la construction européenne, le fonctionnement des institutions, le multilinguisme; interpréter des formulations législatives). Source PDF scanned; pages read visually. Content is original; the book is used only for scope/sequence, never copied.
